title: FitError Result
description: Returns the line or arc fitting error value.
notes: FitError returns root mean square of the distances between each edge point and the found line or arc except the outliers.
see_also:
Applies To

Vision Objects: ArcFinder, BoxFinder, CornerFinder, LineFinder
